title: Extract Website URLs
scenario: Write a JavaScript function that extracts website URLs from a given text. The text may contain URLs in various formats (e.g., https://www.example.com, www.example.com, example.com). The function should return a list of URLs in the format 'http://example.com'. Ensure the function can handle multiple URLs in a single text and that the URLs are extracted correctly.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the function adheres to the constraints provided.
Verify if the JavaScript code has proper syntax and is free of errors.
Check if the function correctly extracts the website URLs from the input text and returns them in the correct format.
